creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Nikola.

Please note that QA (poudriere) logs are not required, but attachments are preferred instead of external URL's if/when they are requested.

Please feel free to confirm QA has successfully passed in your description/comment, similar to:

portlint: OK (looks fine.)
porttest: OK (poudriere: <versions>, <archs>, <options> tested)

Finally, don't forget to set maintainer-approval to + on attachments for ports you are MAINTAINER of. Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]

P.S: Great job with your extensive testing!
